settings.label: Threshold (cents)
settings.info: 0 for none - all orders with at least 1 product will get the gift

settings.label: Necessary customer tag
settings.info: This will require users to be logged in to get the gift

settings.label: Exclude product ids from calculating threshold
Cart Message
settings.default: Product Limit Reached for this Item!

settings.label: PDP Message
settings.default: Product Limit Reached for this Item!

settings.label: Threshold Percentage
settings.info: Discount Percentage after which to show Final Sale

settings.label: Discount Final Sale Label
settings.default: Discount applied this style is now final sale

settings.label: Reveal elements one by one
settings.info: This setting displays blog post and product grid element one after the other.

settings.label: Show free shipping minimum amount
settings.info: Make sure that you have properly configured your [shipping rates](/admin/settings/shipping). To edit the text that displays with the threshold, use the [theme language editor](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/online-store/themes/customizing-themes/language/change-wording)

settings.label: Free shipping minimum amount
settings.info: Only write a number, no letters

settings.label: Cart recommendation fallback collection
settings.info: This collection will be used to display products in case the selected source does not have any products to show.
